primaryAudience: Founders, CTOs, and Senior AI Engineers building enterprise LLM applications.
valueProposition: The Snell SDK provides 'White-Box Arbitrage', executing a local Mathematical Matrix that overrides standard API routing. It dynamically targets the most cost-effective and low-latency LLM per query, implements a Semantic Firewall to block malicious agentic payloads pre-flight, and forces prompt caching.
competitiveAdvantage: Eliminates 'Agentic Bankruptcy' by intercepting infinite execution loops and cascading them to sub-cent intelligence models.
Bypasses the 'Double Hop Latency Tax' typical of other routers by evaluating ELO logic completely locally on the user's hardware.
Zero-knowledge telemetry. We never see the prompts or responses.
brandVoice: Technical, assertive, slightly cinematic, and deeply grounded in mathematics and economics. We do not use generic AI buzzwords.
